pageContext.name: Delita Heiral
pageContext.description: From FINAL FANTASY TACTICS, which gained popularity as the first Tactical RPG in the FINAL FANTASY series: Delita Heiral, the main character Ramza's childhood friend, joins the BRING ARTS line in his War of the Lions era attire!  Staying true to the game's clean and distinctive character design, this figure uniquely captures elements including his skin, hair, body armor, including details on his belt and boots.   The armored shoulders and waist articulate smoothly, allowing for lively and dynamic poses.   The included sword comes in two styles, drawn and sheathed, allowing you to recreate some of the atmosphere and feeling you had playing the original game.  Figure includes display stand.
